title: JioMart Grocery Scraper Input
description: Search JioMart for public grocery and product catalog data, prices, discounts, stock status, images, and URLs. The default input saves one in-stock product from Mumbai for a low-cost first run.

searchQueries.title: Search queries
searchQueries.description: One or more JioMart product searches. Start with one query for a low-cost test. Duplicate products are removed across the run.

locationName.title: Location label
locationName.description: Human-readable location label. JioMart may refine the final detected city, state, and pincode inside the browser session.

latitude.title: Latitude
latitude.description: Delivery-area latitude used for JioMart's location-aware catalog.

longitude.title: Longitude
longitude.description: Delivery-area longitude used for JioMart's location-aware catalog.

brands.title: Brand filter
brands.description: Optional exact brand names. Matching is case-insensitive.

categories.title: Category filter
categories.description: Optional category text filters matched against category, subcategory, and leaf category.

inStockOnly.title: In-stock products only
inStockOnly.description: Exclude products that are not sellable in the detected JioMart store.

minPrice.title: Minimum price (INR)
minPrice.description: Only save products at or above this price.

maxPrice.title: Maximum price (INR)
maxPrice.description: Only save products at or below this price.

maxResults.title: Maximum products
maxResults.description: Maximum unique products saved across the complete run. The default is 1 for a low-cost first run. Use this field, not maxProducts.

maxPagesPerQuery.title: Pages per query
maxPagesPerQuery.description: Maximum JioMart result payloads processed for each search query. Use 1 for test runs. Use this field, not pagesPerQuery.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: India residential proxies are recommended for regional inventory and pricing. Proxy traffic is billed as platform usage.
